title: callerya atropurpurea
intro: Callerya atropurpurea, also known as the purple pea or purple wisteria vine, is a perennial climbing plant native to China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callerya atropurpurea include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of various inflammatory conditions. Callerya atropurpurea can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its aerial parts are often used in herbal preparations to support immune function and overall well-being.
